#ifndef GQA_PAGED_DECODE_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_
#define GQA_PAGED_DECODE_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_

#include <cstdint>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cuda_bf16.h>

#define GQA_NUM_Q_HEADS 32
#define GQA_NUM_KV_HEADS 8
#define GQA_HEAD_DIM 128
#define GQA_PAGE_SIZE 1
#define GQA_GQA_RATIO 4  // 32 / 8

void launch_gqa_paged_decode_h32_kv8_d128_ps1(
    const __nv_bfloat16* q,           // [B, 32, 128]
    const __nv_bfloat16* k_cache,     // [num_pages, 1, 8, 128]
    const __nv_bfloat16* v_cache,     // [num_pages, 1, 8, 128]
    const int32_t* kv_indptr,         // [B+1]
    const int32_t* kv_indices,        // [kv_indptr[-1]]
    float sm_scale,
    __nv_bfloat16* out,               // [B, 32, 128]
    float* lse,                       // [B, 32] base-2 logsumexp
    int32_t batch_size,
    cudaStream_t stream);

#endif  // GQA_PAGED_DECODE_H32_KV8_D128_PS1_KERNEL_H_
